subcodes.title: Words spoken on board the SS Cedric at sea, 1912-04-06
subcodes.first_line: At the table on board the Cedric Abdu'l-Baha spoke about simple diet - how much better
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما مداخله در طعام جسمانی آنها نمی کنیم مداخلهٴ ما در طعام روحانی است
subcodes.subjects: @consumption of meat; vegetarianism; diet, @material and spiritual existence; two books
